fix: rename GlobalError→RouteError in error.tsx + suppress S6759

  with global-error.tsx (both previously exported GlobalError)

  (error boundary prop destructuring is required by Next.js contract)

fix: add --no-install-recommends to apt-get install (docker:S6500)

Reduces image attack surface by not installing unnecessary recommended
packages alongside gcc and libpq-dev in the backend Docker image.

ci: add type-check script and suppress S1128 for app pages

- Suppress typescript:S1128 (unused imports) on frontend/app/** in sonar-project.properties

commit.message:
Preserve copy selections when clearing generated creatives in CreativeIQ (#319)

Previously, after generating creatives the workflow reset to Step 1 and wiped
all copy state, forcing users to re-run the minutes-long copy generation if
they needed to clear and regenerate. Now the user stays on Step 3 with copy
preserved so they can immediately regenerate creatives.

- test_referral.py (16): code generation, redemption, stats, edge cases
- test_webhook_supabase.py (15): auth webhook, secret validation, email fallback

Total: 320 → 397 tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add root package.json so Railpack detects Node.js app for Railway

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix two critical bugs: C++ error message and maxN default too small

1. emphasis.hpp: fix copy-paste bug — reported rejected_overruns twice
   instead of rejected_zero_weights, hiding the real cause of E-step failures
   (zero IS weight due to lambda=0 in PD/DD models with large trees).

2. estimate_rates_control: change MCEM maxN default from 10 to 2000.
   maxN is total augmentation attempts; with the old default of 10 and
   sample_size=200, the E-step could never collect enough trees and
   always failed.

3. Add .mcem_warn_estep() helper that diagnoses the failure mode when
   the E-step fails 5 times in a row: if rejected_zero_weights dominates,
   it explains the lambda=0 root cause and suggests exponential link.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update future_mirror_final_plan.md to reflect current implementation

- 최종 업데이트 날짜: 2026-03-07

- Step 3: 카테고리별 담당 부서 + 타임머신 프레이밍 문구 반영

- 4장: get-reaction API 상세 구조 (요청 파라미터, 3단계 처리 흐름, 말투 규칙, 응답 형식, 재시도 정책) 신규 작성

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Drew cursor offset: zoom to cursor + use offsetX/offsetY

- toCanvasCoords now uses e.offsetX/e.offsetY (canvas-relative) instead
  of clientX - getBoundingClientRect().left, eliminating any container
  position reporting discrepancy
- handleWheel now adjusts pan when zooming so the point under the cursor
  stays fixed in world space — previously elements jumped after every
  scroll zoom, making hit detection appear way off

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Scaling architecture + fix 7 code review findings

Scaling architecture (event-driven, Kafka/Redis/SMPP pool):
- Add card_worker.go: event-driven card state machine with dedupe
- Add SMPP connection pool with windowed back-pressure
- Add Redis hot-state: card state, campaign cache, SMPP correlation, throttle
- Add transactional outbox pattern for campaign activation
- Add ConcurrentConsumer with FNV key-hash worker routing
- Add LogWriter for batch message_log inserts via Kafka
- Rewrite campaign.go: StartCampaign/ResumeCampaign use outbox
- Rewrite consumer.go: single card-events topic with CardWorker
- Rewrite smssender: SMPP pool, Redis correlation, unified card-events
- Add DB migrations: counter_hex, outbox table, indexes
- Make DB pool sizes configurable via env vars

Code review fixes:
1. Campaign creation: accept 'type' as alias for 'campaign_type',
   auto-generate commands when not provided, fix frontend response handling
2. Monitoring date params: accept both 'from'/'date_from' aliases
3. SMS throughput: return {timestamp,sent,delivered,failed} not {hour,count}
4. Health endpoint: return components as array not object map
5. Settings page: wire to real API, fix Kafka topic names
6. Dashboard: remove placeholder "Coming soon" charts
7. API auth: add Authorization header to frontend fetchAPI
8. GORM columns: add explicit column tags for PID/ICCID
9. API security: enforce profile_id scoping, restrict WebSocket origins,
   add CAP upload size limit, add API key auth middleware

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

[VALIDATE] WARN: SqlScript rejected by SM204505 import

SM204505 IMPORT returns "Unknown tag SqlScript" error. Validator now
warns when SqlScript elements are present since they must be removed
before packaging .zip for import. DAC [PXDB*] attributes auto-create
columns, so SQL is rarely needed.

commit.message:
fix: move logout modal to layout so position:fixed works correctly

The logout confirmation modal was inside <nav> which has backdrop-filter,
creating a containing block that trapped position:fixed children to the nav
instead of the viewport. Moving the modal to +layout.svelte fixes centering.

Also rethemed modal to use --glass-bg-heavy + --clr-text + rgba(var(--ui-rgb))
so it adapts naturally to all four palettes instead of using dark-glass vars
that look saturated on sky/neutral.

re-signs it properly through the codesign wrapper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement Phase G: Social grammar (15 operations + named functions)

Add grammar package with all 15 social grammar operations: Emit,
Respond, Derive, Extend, Retract, Annotate, Acknowledge, Propagate,
Endorse, Subscribe, Channel, Delegate, Consent, Sever, Merge.

Three named function compositions: Recommend (Propagate+Channel),
Invite (Endorse+Subscribe), Forgive (Subscribe after Sever).

Eight new grammar content types with visitor support, registered in
the DefaultRegistry. 22 tests at 88.6% coverage, all operations
verified on-chain with hash integrity.

commit.message:
research: Gnedenko-Kolmogorov domain of attraction formalization (clt-oq-01-oq-01) (#3383)

Formalize the Gnedenko-Kolmogorov theorem framework in Lean 4:
- IsSymmetricStable: α-stability via characteristic functions
- InSymmetricDomainOfAttraction: domain of attraction concept
- IsSlowlyVarying/IsRegularlyVarying: tail behavior definitions
- stableCharFun_isStable: proved exp(-|t|^α) is α-stable
- gnedenko_kolmogorov_symmetric: proper axiom statement replacing True placeholder
- gaussian_unique_finite_variance and classical_clt_as_domain axioms

2 sorries in stable_self_attraction (filter API for rpow composition).
Identifies 6 Mathlib gaps for stable distribution theory.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update spec with pg_locks polling, PROCEDURE design, and style fixes

- Replace safety_delay heuristic with pg_locks + pg_stat_activity polling
  for concurrent writer safety (functionally equivalent to WaitForLockers)
- Document PROCEDURE-based execution with per-item COMMIT support
- Apply postgres-ai rules: lowercase SQL, sentence-case headings,
  "Postgres" terminology, em dash spacing, no emojis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: pg_pipe

commit.message:
Add golden rules enforcement — ast-grep rules + integration tests

Three ast-grep rules (R-002 exit code range, R-005 HashMap in output,
R-016 witness append-only) and 10 integration tests covering R-001
(version field), R-006 (introspection flags), R-007 (operator.json
parity with source), R-008 (witness opt-out), R-017 (witness failure
independence), R-021 (CSV row preservation).

Rules are portable — structured to lift into a shared spine-rules
package when other tools adopt them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: venue → cloud sync for laps, billing, pods, leaderboard

- Add POST /sync/push endpoint accepting laps, track_records,
  personal_bests, billing_sessions, and live pod status
- Extend cloud_sync background task to push venue data after pull
- Pod push updates both DB and in-memory state so PWA sees live pods
- Track records and personal bests use MIN merge (fastest time wins)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

research: formalize circle-squaring piece reduction (erdos-1124-oq-01) (#3384)

Formalize the minimum piece count problem for Tarski's circle-squaring.
Define N-piece equidecomposition, prove reflexivity, axiomatize known
bounds: Laczkovich (≤10^50), Marks-Unger (Borel, <10^5), and the
topological lower bound (≥3). 2 proved theorems, 12 axioms, 0 sorries.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Enterprise Agronomic Plan — product requirements by farm

New read-only enterprise page showing procurement-level data:
- Seed Requirements by Farm: crop acre columns + seed product quantity columns (lbs)
- Fertilizer Requirements by Farm: product lbs, total cost, $/acre, tonnes, truck loads
- Chemical Requirements by Farm: product litres, total cost, $/acre, spray loads, total input $/acre
Dynamic columns built from actual product catalog across all farms.

Replace Google Geocoding fallback with Nominatim (OSM)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(theme): increase post-item min-height and padding-bottom for wrapped categories

When a post has 4+ categories they wrap to a second line. Because
.post-taxonomy is position:absolute;bottom:2rem, wrapping pushes its
top edge up toward the float image. Increasing min-height (200→230px)
and padding-bottom (4rem→5.5rem) on .post-content ensures enough
vertical clearance between the thumbnail and the category row.

Co-authored-by: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: task manager app with all V1 features

Mobile-first daily task manager built with React Native (Expo SDK 54),
Expo Router, and expo-sqlite. Features include add/complete/delete/undo
tasks, drag-and-drop reordering, collapsible descriptions, chronological
"Done Today" section with midnight auto-reset, and a read-only calendar
history view. Supports light and dark mode with Ocean Blue theme.

Drop all history for check-ins + add clear conversation button

for clearing conversations (uses existing clearConversation() function).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Tune algorithm for real-world meter noise, add debug monitor

Fix silence-exit bug: brief below-threshold dips were resetting EMAs
and causing large fader jumps. Now only resets on confirmed silence.

Retune parameters for real X32 meter data (10-15 dB swings per reading):
- Fast EMA 1s->4s, deadband 2->3dB, scene threshold 4->5dB
- Slew 1.5->0.5, scene slew 20->6, error boost 5x@5dB->3x@8dB
- Persist all algorithm params in config.json

Add /debug page with live algorithm monitor: EMA charts, divergence
meter, fader history, and event log for real-time diagnostics.

commit.message:
Redesign threading model: 5 fragmented modules → 3 composable ones

Replace thread_safety, parallel_recording, queue_submit_sync,
descriptor_pool_sync with sync_token (unified token-based ownership),
pool_ownership (generic pool→children transitive sync), and a
simplified lock_ordering (Set-based, no LIFO constraint, proper
deadlock-freedom proof). Per-operation sync requirements matching
Vulkan spec. 505 verified, 0 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Add interactive QA tests for UGC + fix grid card heights and aria-labels

- 12 interactive Playwright tests covering hover, click, layout, and responsive behavior

- Tests catch: star flicker, icon alignment, card height mismatch, delete visibility

commit.message:
Set working directory for agent sessions so devtools can discover them

The `-` project dir (from cwd=/) fails devtools' isValidEncodedPath.
Using ~/.claude/workspace as cwd gives a valid encoded project name.
